product.name: GitHub PR Checklist
product.tagline: Turn pull requests into an actionable review checklist.
product.category: Single-purpose Codex skill for GitHub workflow

goals: Make the repository feel like a sharp, useful product rather than a prompt dump.
Support README redesign, simple landing page, and social preview assets without changing product logic.
audience: Founders and small teams improving GitHub workflows
Open-source users who star useful, tightly-scoped tools

avoid: Generic glossy gradients with no product proof
Claims of autonomous approval or magical correctness
Long abstract explainers before showing output

proof_points: Accepts a PR URL or owner/repo#number
Reads diff, comments, and checks when GitHub access is available
Falls back to diff or patch without changing the output contract
Produces Key Changes, Risks, Questions, Suggested Tests, and optional Reply Draft
asset_slots: Hero screenshot or stylized checklist mock
